meta.title: Building a Form Store with Zustand
meta.description: Create persistent form state with Zustand for multi-step forms

steps.title: Understanding the Requirements
steps.content: A multi-step form store needs: current step tracking, form data storage, navigation methods, and persistence.

steps.title: Defining the Store Interface
steps.content: Start with the TypeScript interface for your store.

steps.title: Creating the Store
steps.content: Implement the store with persist middleware.
steps.explanation: The persist middleware automatically saves to localStorage and rehydrates on mount.
